industry: Independent Power and Renewable Electricity Producers
name: Energix - Renewable Energies Ltd
summary: Energix - Renewable Energies Ltd initiates, develops, and constructs renewable energy projects in Israel and Poland. It owns and operates 30 small, and 2 medium systems with a total capacity of approximately 3.2 MWp; Banie wind farm with a total capacity of 106 MW; and Hawa wind farm with a capacity of 13.2MW. The company was incorporated in 2006 and is based in Ramat Gan, Israel. Energix - Renewable Energies Ltd is a subsidiary of Alony Hetz Properties and Investments Ltd.
